detail.description: Connor Joe grounds into a force out, shortstop Marcelo Mayer to second baseman Anthony Seigler. Cole Young out at 2nd. Connor Joe advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Anthony Seigler.

Connor Joe singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Connor Joe advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Leody Taveras. Connor Joe out at 3rd on the throw, center fielder Leody Taveras to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to third baseman Blaze Alexander.
Connor Joe lines out to third baseman Miguel Vargas.
Connor Joe reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Colson Montgomery.
Connor Joe flies out to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski in foul territory.
Connor Joe grounds out, third baseman Austin Riley to first baseman Matt Olson.
Connor Joe lines out to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
Connor Joe flies out to center fielder Kyle Isbel.
Connor Joe flies out to right fielder Jac Caglianone.
Connor Joe homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Connor Joe pops out to second baseman Michael Massey.
Connor Joe flies out to center fielder Evan Carter.
Connor Joe singles on a ground ball to third baseman Josh Jung.
Connor Joe doubles (1) on a fly ball to left fielder Nathan Church.
Connor Joe flies out to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Connor Joe lines out to center fielder Victor Scott II. Cole Young to 3rd.
Connor Joe singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Mitch Garver scores. Cole Young scores.
Connor Joe grounds into a force out, fielded by third baseman Isaac Paredes. Josh Naylor out at 3rd. Brendan Donovan to 3rd. Connor Joe to 1st. Throwing error by third baseman Isaac Paredes.
Connor Joe grounds out, second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker.
Connor Joe grounds out, third baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger.
Connor Joe grounds into a double play, shortstop Corey Seager to second baseman Josh Smith to first baseman Jake Burger. Mitch Garver out at 2nd. Connor Joe out at 1st.
Connor Joe singles on a line drive to right fielder Tristan Peters.
Connor Joe doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Connor Joe lines out sharply to left fielder Ramón Laureano.
